description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The ramp features a smooth, curved wooden surface with visible seams and patches, designed for skateboarding, BMX, or similar activities. Both ends of the ramp are flanked by sturdy black brick walls, one of which is decorated with colorful graffiti art. The top edges of the ramp are bordered by metal safety railings, providing protection for users at the platform level. The platforms at each end offer space for skaters to prepare before dropping in. The overall design is robust and urban, with a mix of natural wood and industrial materials.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with black brick side walls, metal railings, and graffiti art, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graffiti-decorated black brick wall, wooden ramp surface, and metal railings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full curved half-pipe structure, both platforms, and the continuous wooden surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain black brick wall, wooden ramp, and railings, lacking graffiti.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the half-pipe, showing the curve, platforms, and wooden surface with visible seams.
